title: AnalyzeMe
description: Local-first anomaly detection for real datasets. Upload a CSV or JSON file — the file never leaves your browser. Analysis runs entirely in DuckDB-Wasm.

items.title: Nulls
items.desc: Flags missing values across all columns

items.title: Duplicates
items.desc: Finds repeated rows — ID columns excluded automatically

items.title: Outliers
items.desc: IQR-based detection — skips identifiers and timestamps

items.title: Sensitivity control
items.desc: Three levels adjust outlier threshold — conservative to aggressive

items.title: Ground truth mode
items.desc: Import ForgeMe data to score detection accuracy

items.title: Verdict per row
items.desc: Labels each anomaly as detected, missed or false positive

items.title: Copy to clipboard
items.desc: Exports rows as TSV with TYPE and VERDICT columns

items.title: In-browser only
items.desc: DuckDB-Wasm — no server, no uploads, no logs

nextDesc: These are candidates for the next version. Vote for what matters to you — it shapes the scope.

next.title: Z-score / MAD detection
next.desc: Alternative to IQR — better for non-normal distributions

next.title: Export as CSV
next.desc: Download full anomaly report with metadata

next.title: Column selection for duplicates
next.desc: Choose which fields define a unique row

next.title: Domain rules engine
next.desc: Define custom validation rules per column

next.title: Excel / Parquet support
next.desc: Analyze columnar and spreadsheet formats directly

later.title: Isolation Forest
later.desc: Tree-based anomaly scoring for complex datasets

later.title: Schema-aware types
later.desc: Auto-classify columns as measures, identifiers or timestamps

later.title: Dataset history
later.desc: Save and revisit previous analysis runs

suggestPlaceholder: Describe what you'd like to see in AnalyzeMe...
suggestionThanks: Thanks — your suggestion is under review. We'll email you when it's published.
